name: impact-preview with --rule-file processes a single rule across the working tree and reports violation_count per F-6
command: mkdir -p tree && printf 'eval("bad")\n' > tree/x.js && printf 'eval("also-bad")\n' > tree/y.js && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"no-eval","detector":"grep -n eval || true"}]}' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file rule.json --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'no-eval' out.txt && grep -q 'violation_count' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
